ast.name: description
ast.source: Toggle on if this is an Obsidian vault.
ast.target: 如果这是 Obsidian 库，请开启此开关。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Comma-separated list of files to exclude.
ast.target: 要排除的文件列表，用逗号分隔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Comma-separated list of folders to exclude.
ast.target: 要排除的文件夹列表，用逗号分隔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Comma-separated list of headings to exclude. Note: currently only applies to blocks (2025-04-07).
ast.target: 要排除的标题列表，用逗号分隔。注意：目前仅适用于块（2025-04-07）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turning on will include the folder path in the connections results.
ast.target: 开启后会在连接结果中包含文件夹路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turn off to prevent rendering markdown and display connection results as plain text.
ast.target: 关闭以避免渲染 Markdown，并将连接结果显示为纯文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Adjust the number of connections displayed in the connections view (default 20).
ast.target: 调整连接视图中显示的连接数量（默认 20）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exclude notes that already link to the current note from the connections results.
ast.target: 将已链接到当前笔记的笔记从连接结果中排除。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Exclude notes that are already linked from within the current note from appearing in the connections results.
ast.target: 将当前笔记中已链接的笔记从连接结果中排除。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Notes must match this value in their file/folder path. Matching notes will be included in the connections results. Separate multiple values with commas.
ast.target: 笔记的文件/文件夹路径必须匹配此值。匹配的笔记将包含在连接结果中。多个值请用逗号分隔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Notes must *not* match this value in their file/folder path. Matching notes will be *excluded* from the connections results. Separate multiple values with commas.
ast.target: 笔记的文件/文件夹路径必须*不*匹配此值。匹配的笔记将从连接结果中*排除*。多个值请用逗号分隔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show only sources in the connections results (no blocks).
ast.target: 在连接结果中仅显示来源（不含区块）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show only sources in the connections results (no frontmatter blocks).
ast.target: 在连接结果中仅显示来源（不含 frontmatter 区块）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select a model platform to use with Smart Model.
ast.target: 选择与智能模型一起使用的模型平台。

ast.target: 本地，512 个 tokens，384 维（推荐）

ast.name: description
ast.target: 本地，8,192 tokens，768 维度，中英双语

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enter the host for your Ollama instance
ast.target: 请输入你的 Ollama 实例主机

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select a platform/provider for chat models.
ast.target: 选择聊天模型的平台/提供商。

ast.source: Refresh the list of available models.

ast.name: description

ast.name: description
ast.source: Select the image resolution for the chat model.

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name of your Azure OpenAI resource (e.g. 'my-azure-openai').
ast.target: 你的 Azure OpenAI 资源名称（例如“my-azure-openai”）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The name of your specific model deployment (e.g. 'gpt35-deployment').
ast.target: 你的特定模型部署名称（例如“gpt35-deployment”）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The API version for Azure OpenAI (e.g. '2024-10-01-preview').
ast.target: Azure OpenAI 的 API 版本（例如“2024-10-01-preview”）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pick a built-in or external adapter to parse request/response data.
ast.target: 选择内置或外部适配器来解析请求/响应数据。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enter the model name for your endpoint if needed.
ast.target: 如有需要，请输入你的端点的模型名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Path portion of the URL (leading slash optional)
ast.target: URL 的路径部分（可选前导斜杠）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable streaming if your API supports it.
ast.target: 如果你的 API 支持，请启用流式传输。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Max number of tokens your model can handle in the prompt.
ast.target: 模型在提示词中可处理的最大 token 数量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If your service requires an API key, add it here.
ast.target: 如果你的服务需要 API 密钥，请在此添加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Time in seconds to wait before re-importing a file after modification.
ast.target: 文件修改后重新导入前需等待的时间（秒）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Headings/patterns to exclude; use newline to separate multiple patterns. Case-sensitive
ast.target: 要排除的标题/模式；使用换行分隔多个模式。区分大小写

ast.name: description
ast.source: If off, any links found inside excluded heading sections are ignored (not followed).
ast.target: 若关闭，排除的标题区块内找到的链接将被忽略（不跟随）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text inserted at the top of the final output.
ast.target: 插入到最终输出顶部的文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text inserted at the bottom of the final output.
ast.target: 插入到最终输出底部的文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trigger lookup when user message references 'my notes', etc.
ast.target: 当用户消息提到“我的笔记”等时触发检索。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Show retrieved context for approval before sending to AI.
ast.target: 在发送给 AI 前显示已检索的上下文以供确认。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Whether to stream the response from the AI.
ast.target: 是否以流式方式返回 AI 的响应。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Choose which modifier (if any) is required with Enter to send the chat.
ast.target: 选择发送聊天时按 Enter 需要的修饰键（如有）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reccommended if the model you're using supports it. Turn off to use more-compatible yet less-reliable format.
ast.target: 如果你使用的模型支持，建议开启。关闭后将使用更兼容但更不可靠的格式。
